name: Маска Кирки
notes: The Pick's Mask of the Defense of the First Adit, Kragmir's staged founding legend. The role of the hero who answered the breach with a miner's greatpick; the current bearer is an orc arena professional, and by tradition her name is never announced. The counter-attacker of the Five: she charges off the platform to punish overextended raiders, her fatal pick turns crits into showstoppers, a kill sends her running for the next one, and orc ferocity keeps her standing through a killing blow. The most baitable of the Five: she breaks script first.

actions.name: Sudden Charge
actions.text: Маска Кирки Strides twice. If she ends her movement within melee reach of at least one enemy, she can make a melee Strike against that enemy.

actions.name: Miner's Bellow
actions.text: She roars the pit-boss call that clears a working face. She attempts an Intimidation check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Demoralize] against every enemy within 30 feet, without the usual penalty for a target that does not share a language with her.

actions.name: Armor Breaker
actions.text: The pick is made for stone, not for people. On a critical hit with her greatpick, the target also takes @Damage[1d8[persistent,bleed]] damage.

actions.name: Bloodlust
actions.text: The crowd noise gets into her. When she scores a critical hit or reduces an enemy to 0 Hit Points, she gains a +10-foot status bonus to her Speed until the end of her next turn.
